title: senna neglecta var. neglecta
intro: Senna neglecta var. neglecta, also known as Smooth Mexican Buckthorn, is a plant species native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a laxative and help with digestion due to its high content of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Senna neglecta var. neglecta include its potential to relieve constipation, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Senna neglecta var. neglecta typically involve drying and processing the leaves or roots to create teas, tinctures, or capsules that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
